channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Permit Holders Time Plate painted, 19th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fielding Street, Walworth, Greater London

item.title: Permit Holders time plate painted, 19th April

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gate latch on disabled resident gate broken off, 19th April
item.description:
Accessible latch to flat 3 gate has broken off, making access difficult and closure of the gate impossible. This has been reported multiple times and not resolved. This needs urgent repair please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brandon Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of sand remaining after oil spillage, 19th April
item.description:
Fire service cleaned up oil spillage but lots of sand was put down and not cleaned after a couple of weeks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ridge Way, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle been here for months, 19th April
item.description:
Same problem as my last report. These vans have been parked here for months and never move. No one on our road are the owners. They are just left here and are an obstruction. Not only these vans but also other vehicles that do not live in this neighborhood park here cluttering our road making if difficult for car flow. Also emptying rubbish out of their cars. We need double yellow lines to prevent parking or permit holders only.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Zangwill Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping Top Orissa Road, 19th April
item.description:
Blocking pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Orissa Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement Obstruction, 19th April
item.description:
A signboard and a bench are placed on the pavement, and the space is so narrow that pedestrians often have to walk on the road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Old Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car blocking my entrance to garage, 19th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Diameter Road, Petts Wood, Greater London

item.title: Potentially dangerous wall at Raphael nursery Rudloe Road, 19th April
item.description:
The wall at this nursery between their grounds and the pavement looks very fragile and in need of repairs or replacement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Honeybrook Road, Clapham, Greater London
